_comment: Ahrena MCP: Slack server config. HTTP-first per lex-mcp §5. Both platforms use the official remote endpoint at mcp.slack.com/mcp; auth is confidential OAuth 2.0 (browser flow on first call; client_id + client_secret per the Slack app). Source of truth: https://docs.slack.dev/ai/slack-mcp-server/. This is the first notification-provider MCP in the framework — codex-mcp-slack documents the provider-specific tools; codex-notifications maps the logical channels declared in .ahrena/.directives (notifications.channels.*) to the corresponding Slack channel names. Merged into platform MCP files during install.
